sourceTitle: Generative Artificial Intelligence in the Classroom: FAQ's
evidenceSnippetOriginal: The University also recommends that you include a statement on your syllabus that informs students about your expectations with respect to the use of AI. We have created sample statements for instructors to include in course syllabi and course assignments to help shape the message to students about what AI technology is, or is not, allowed.
evidenceSnippetDisplay: The University also recommends that you include a statement on your syllabus that informs students about your expectations with respect to the use of AI
